articles.title: Suspect in string of random attacks in Georgia is naturalized citizen from UK, DHS says
articles.summary: The suspect in a string of random attacks in Georgia, including in the killing of a DHS employee, is a naturalized U.S. citizen from the U.K., according to the agency.

articles.title: From Iran to the fake Jesus image, Trump is facing a growing backlash for his inflammatory rhetoric
articles.summary: Trump deleted an AI image of himself as Jesus after backlash from Catholic leaders and conservative allies, reigniting debate over his mental fitness.

articles.title: DOJ sues Connecticut, New Haven over sanctuary policies: 'Open defiance'
articles.summary: The DOJ has filed a lawsuit against Connecticut and its city of New Haven, arguing that their sanctuary policies interfere with federal immigration enforcement.

articles.title: House avoids unprecedented four-member expulsion week as Swalwell and Gonzales resign instead
articles.summary: Two House members resigned amid scandals, but potential expulsions of Reps. Cherfilus-McCormick and Mills raise parity and political math concerns.

articles.title: New video shows Oklahoma high school principal tackling gunman who opened fire inside the school
articles.summary: New video shows Oklahoma high school principal Kirk Moore tackling a gunman and wrestling the weapon away from him after he allegedly opened fire inside Pauls Valley High School.

articles.title: ‘Bachelorette’ star Taylor Frankie Paul won’t face new domestic violence charges

articles.title: Former UCLA gynecologist sentenced after pleading guilty to sexually assaulting patients at school
articles.summary: James Heaps, a former UCLA OB-GYN, pleaded guilty to 13 felony counts and was sentenced to 11 years in prison for sexually assaulting his patients.

articles.title: Raiders GM John Spytek admits to getting 'a few calls' about the No 1 pick ahead of next week's NFL Draft
articles.summary: Las Vegas Raiders are expected to take Indiana QB Fernando Mendoza first overall, but GM John Spytek said teams are still calling about a trade up.

articles.title: Top United Nations Human Rights official points to reparations as the 'key to dismantling systemic racism'
articles.summary: U.N. High Commissioner Volker Türk applauded global reparations efforts, calling them essential to dismantling systemic racism tied to colonialism and enslavement.

articles.title: Kylie Jenner goes topless on Instagram for latest fashion launch
articles.summary: Kylie Jenner strips down for a bold topless photo to announce Khy's new "Born in LA" collection, designed and mostly manufactured in Los Angeles.

articles.title: TPUSA reporter attacked at ICE protest warns a dark new line has been crossed in America’s political wars
articles.summary: Reporter Savanah Hernandez says she was attacked multiple times at a Minneapolis anti-ICE protest and is pushing for full charges against suspects.

articles.title: Amanda Peet says parents compared her acting dreams to being a ‘hooker’
articles.summary: Amanda Peet shares how her parents reacted to her acting dreams and discussed her breast cancer diagnosis on the "Smartless" podcast with Jason Bateman, Will Arnett And Sean Hayes.

articles.title: Caitlin Clark's newest Fever teammate has dramatic history with superstar
articles.summary: Raven Johnson joins Caitlin Clark on the Indiana Fever after a viral 2023 NCAA Final Four moment between them that Johnson says led to online bullying.

articles.title: Dangerous water warnings hit trendy vacation spot after powerful storm pounds area
articles.summary: Hawaii health officials issued brown water advisories across Kaua'i, O'ahu, Maui and the Big Island after a Kona Low storm brought heavy rainfall.

articles.title: Marvel star Vincent D’Onofrio says he ‘can’t do’ Kingpin transformation anymore
articles.summary: Vincent D'Onofrio reveals he switched to a fat suit for his Kingpin role in "Daredevil: Born Again," saying he can no longer safely gain weight.

articles.title: Ruby Rose says she filed a police report against Katy Perry over alleged sexual assault two decades ago
articles.summary: Ruby Rose accuses Katy Perry of sexual assault allegedly occurring over 20 years ago and revealed she finalized police reports from the alleged incident.

articles.title: Orioles' Craig Albernaz says he must eat baby food for weeks after foul ball to face leads to 7 fractures

articles.title: Trump-backed mega event to bring all 50 states to DC in world’s fair-style bash

articles.title: DC appeals court orders Judge Boasberg to halt Trump contempt probe over deportation flights

articles.title: Bernie Sanders aims to block sale of bombs and bulldozers to Israel, accusing US ally of 'genocide'
articles.summary: Sen. Bernie Sanders of Vermont is seeking to block the sale of bombs and bulldozers to the foreign nation of Israel, which recently worked with the U.S. to bombard Iran.

articles.title: House Dems unveil bill to examine removing Trump using 25th Amendment

articles.title: Socialist Mamdani touts government-run grocery plan as ‘grand experiment’' at new grocery store site

articles.title: Kim Jong Un oversees cruise missile launches from prized new North Korean warship

articles.title: Viktor Orbán concedes defeat as opposition leader heads for potential supermajority win
articles.summary: Orbán conceded defeat Sunday as opposition leader Péter Magyar surged toward a landslide victory, signaling a major political shift in Hungary.

articles.summary: Hungarians vote in pivotal election pitting PM Viktor Orbán against rival Peter Magyar. Vice President JD Vance visited Hungary last week and met with the prime minister.
